description_long: This is an ornate, antique-style oil lamp made of metal, featuring a bulbous body with intricate engraved patterns and a pointed lid. The lamp has a long, narrow spout on one end and a decorative, curled handle on the opposite side, both seamlessly integrated into the body. The base is hexagonal and slightly flared, providing stability and an additional decorative touch. The surface is richly textured with floral and geometric motifs, giving it a luxurious and historical appearance. The metallic finish is dark, likely brass or bronze, with a slightly aged patina. The lamp's overall design is reminiscent of traditional Middle Eastern or Aladdin-style oil lamps, often used as decorative pieces or collectibles.
description: An ornate, antique-style metal oil lamp with intricate engravings, a pointed lid, curled handle, and long spout, finished in a dark metallic patina.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed lid, bulbous body, and the hexagonal base, with the spout and handle partially visible on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated spout, curled handle, and the full profile of the engraved body and base.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the handle and the back of the lamp, with the spout extending away and the lid centered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the spout in the foreground, the curled handle in the background, and the ornate engravings along the body.
